evals.name: audit-remains-read-only
evals.prompt: Audit the durable documentation in FIXTURE_ROOT against implemented behavior. Report drift and proposed wording in chat. This is audit-only: do not modify files.
evals.expected_output: Discovers PRODUCT.md as owner, reports the 4100 versus 4200 drift with file evidence and proposed wording, preserves files, and does not invent another docs owner.

evals.name: binding-rule-contradiction
evals.prompt: Audit FIXTURE_ROOT read-only. PRODUCT.md explicitly owns a binding batch-size invariant. Compare it with implementation and tests, classify the discrepancy, and do not edit either side.
evals.expected_output: Reports a binding-rule contradiction, preserves PRODUCT.md, does not normalize the rule to the implementation, names the maintainer decision needed, and leaves the checkout unchanged.
